title: C4OS Grill Question 010: Freeze Artifacts
description: This question decides what documentation should be created after the grill before implementation planning starts. Submit the form, then paste the generated response back into chat.

questions.label: Which artifacts should be produced after this grill?
options: ADR for Browser and agent authority
ADR for extension enablement and prompt tags
No new artifacts; update existing research records only
questions.help: Select the docs that should exist before implementation planning begins.

questions.label: Does Browser and agent authority need an ADR before implementation?
options: Yes, create ADR before implementation planning
Defer ADR until implementation discovers a concrete trade-off
Only create ADR if Browser implementation conflicts with Tauri/Wry proof evidence
questions.help: This asks neutrally whether the Browser/agent authority trade-off needs a durable decision record.

questions.label: Which context promotions should happen now?
options: Promote full documented/r04 scope is MVP
Promote Browser project profile and request-scoped agent browsing
Promote Terminal allowlist and split terminal model
Promote extension enablement and prompt tags
Do not promote more context until after freeze document
questions.help: These would update .agents/context so future specs do not need to read the whole grill session.

questions.label: Clarifications
questions.help: Add any preference about naming, where freeze artifacts should live, or what should not be written yet.
